theme_and_archetype.description: Dark futuristic AAA gaming marketplace. Handcrafted, cinematic quality mixing Riot Games, Steam, and high-end tech (Apple/Tesla).

typography.instructions: Never use Inter or Roboto. Headings must be Unbounded for a wide, aggressive, futuristic gaming feel. Outfit for clean, geometric body text readability. Make sure to import these fonts from Google Fonts in index.css or index.html.

components.cursor: Custom animated glowing cursor. Uses framer-motion to stretch on move and snap/magnetize to clickable buttons. Base: w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-cyan-400/80 blur-[2px] mix-blend-screen.

buttons.primary: relative overflow-hidden group bg-transparent text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 border border-cyan-400/50 hover:border-cyan-400 transition-all. Add an inner glowing span that follows cursor or scales up on hover.
buttons.magnetic: Wrap interactive buttons with a magnetic framer-motion container.

cards.marketplace: Premium 3D hover product cards. Use framer-motion for tilt effect (perspective: 1000px, rotateX/Y on mouse move). Glass background, border border-white/10. Hover: border-cyan-400/50 + cyan shadow glow. Images must have object-cover (never stretched).

components.navbar: Fixed z-50 top-0 w-full glassmorphism. Uses framer-motion `useScroll` to hide on scroll down and reveal on scroll up.
components.toast: Beautiful animated glass toast. Position bottom-right. bg-[#0B1220]/80 backdrop-blur-lg border border-cyan-500/30 text-white rounded-xl shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,255,0.2)].
components.post_creation: Glassmorphism form with glowing input borders (focus: ring-2 ring-cyan-400). Multi-image upload with grid preview.
components.admin_dashboard: Dark futuristic panels. Recharts with custom tooltips (glass background) and neon stroke colors (cyan, purple). Roles (Admin, Mod, Viewer) displayed with glowing badges.

motion_and_interactions.loading_screen: Premium initial loader. Black background, glowing animated logo, cyan/purple particles floating, energy waves before revealing the app. z-[100].
motion_and_interactions.backgrounds: Animated backgrounds globally. Layer 1: #05070B. Layer 2: tsparticles (floating dust/stars). Layer 3: Moving CSS radial gradients (cyan/purple) with 30% opacity and mix-blend-screen. Layer 4: subtle noise texture.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: framer-motion whileInView={ opacity: 1, y: 0 } initial={ opacity: 0, y: 40 }. Mix scale, blur reveal, and mask reveal for sections.
motion_and_interactions.hero_3d: Floating 3D scene. Requires @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei. Floating gaming controller model, RGB lights, energy ring, holographic cards, and dynamic lighting moving with mouse parallax.

hero_backgrounds.description: Brightly lit gaming controller against dark backdrop
Illuminated gaming controller with blue lights

games.description: Tactical officer aiming rifle in urban setting at night

testing_requirements.data-testid: All interactive elements, buttons, links, inputs, and major informational blocks MUST include a `data-testid` attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., `data-testid='marketplace-buy-button'` or `data-testid='admin-login-submit'`.

specific_page_instructions.account_detail: Gallery with image zoom and lightbox. Layout: Left side sticky large image, bottom thumbnail strip. Right side: Price, glowing Buy button, Description, Facebook/Phone contact info, share/favorite actions.
specific_page_instructions.admin_dashboard: Route: /admin25. Glass grid layout. Cards for 300K-900K, 901K-1.5M, 1.6M-15M groups. Analytics charts must have transparent backgrounds and neon line strokes.
specific_page_instructions.marketplace_search: Realtime search input with glowing border. Filters panel (Newest/Oldest/Highest Price/Lowest Price) using custom animated dropdowns.

instructions_to_main_agent: You have .js files not .tsx files, so all code implementations must use JavaScript (.jsx/.js), NOT TypeScript.
All interactive elements must include a `data-testid` attribute.
Ensure image `object-fit` is always `cover` to prevent stretching on marketplace cards.
Use framer-motion heavily for micro-interactions: magnetic buttons, smooth scroll reveals, and the custom stretching cursor.
For the 3D Hero, implement a @react-three/fiber canvas with floating models, particle effects, and pointer-based parallax.
Ensure all backgrounds have #05070B as base, then layer glassmorphism and glow effects on top. Never use pure black #000000 or plain greys.
